scenario.first_message: [Deepfake voice of Infosys CEO]: Exclusive employee IPO allocation. Invest Rs 1 lakh via company portal. HR calling now for UPI transfer. Limited to first 100 employees.

v2.note: v2 was not re-run on this single scenario (no GPU available); its detection rate on the 'novel' split overall is 97.1% (n=34). This scenario is in that split.

delta.interpretation: Scripted analyzer missed this scam (score below threshold). v2 catches scams in this split at 97% rate.
